name: mnemonic-quiz-daemon
description: Electron POC for generating personal-context quizzes from locally captured user data.

scripts.dev:sign-electron: node -e "if (process.platform === 'darwin') { try { require('child_process').execSync('codesign --force --deep --sign - node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app'); console.log('Successfully ad-hoc signed Electron.app for macOS notifications development.'); } catch (e) { console.error('Failed to sign Electron.app:', e.message); } }"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run dev:sign-electron && electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.preload.json

extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureDescription: Mnemonic needs access to screen recording to capture active window previews for local OCR and recall quiz generation.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Mnemonic needs to control other applications via AppleScript to query active window titles and browser tab URLs for local context tracking.
extendInfo.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Mnemonic needs permission to send system notifications when a new recall quiz is ready to be taken.
